de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.meta

extends java.lang.Object

      Registers the given converter for the specified class.

      • ValueInjector

        public ValueInjector()

    • Method Detail

      • injection

        public static <T> T injection(ProofScriptCommand<?> command,
                              T obj,
                              java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> arguments)
                       throws ArgumentRequiredException,
                              InjectionReflectionException,
                              NoSpecifiedConverterException,
                              ConversionException
        Injects the given arguments in the obj. For more details see inject(ProofScriptCommand, Object, Map)
        Type Parameters:
        T - an arbitrary type
        Parameters:
        command - a proof script command
        obj - a parameter class with annotation
        arguments - a non-null map of string pairs
        Returns:
        the same object as obj
        Throws:
        ArgumentRequiredException - a required argument was not given in arguments
        InjectionReflectionException - an access on some reflection methods occurred
        NoSpecifiedConverterException - unknown type for the current converter map
        ConversionException - an converter could not translate the given value in arguments

      • getInstance

        public static ValueInjector getInstance()
        Returns the default instance of a ValueInjector Use with care. No multi-threading.
        Returns:
        a static reference to the default converter.
        See Also:
        createDefault()

      • createDefault

        public static ValueInjector createDefault()
        Returns a fresh instance of a ValueInjector with the support for basic primitive data types.
        Returns:
        a fresh instance

      • inject

        public <T> T inject(ProofScriptCommand<?> command,
                    T obj,
                    java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> arguments)
             throws ConversionException,
                    InjectionReflectionException,
                    NoSpecifiedConverterException,
                    ArgumentRequiredException
        Injects the converted version of the given arguments in the given obj.
        Type Parameters:
        T - type safety
        Parameters:
        command - a proof script command
        obj - a non-null instance of a parameter class (with annotation)
        arguments - a non-null string map
        Returns:
        the same object as obj
        Throws:
        ArgumentRequiredException - a required argument was not given in arguments
        InjectionReflectionException - an access on some reflection methods occurred
        NoSpecifiedConverterException - unknown type for the current converter map
        ConversionException - an converter could not translate the given value in arguments
        See Also:
        Option, Flag

      • addConverter

        public <T> void addConverter(java.lang.Class<T> clazz,
                             StringConverter<T> conv)
        Registers the given converter for the specified class.
        Type Parameters:
        T - an arbitrary type
        Parameters:
        clazz - a class
        conv - a converter for the given class

      • getConverter

        public <T> StringConverter<T> getConverter(java.lang.Class<T> clazz)
        Finds a converter for the given class.
        Type Parameters:
        T - an arbitrary type
        Parameters:
        clazz - a non-null class
        Returns:
        null or a suitable converter (registered) converter for the requested class.
